segments.text: AstroIndexer 1.0, Release Candidate 1, is here — the biggest step yet toward the full release.
AstroIndexer now includes its own plate solver — native solving with full distortion data, and no external tools to install. Eighteen point six percent faster than ASTAP.
The new Inspect Loupe examines any sub at full resolution, with live quality metrics that match PixInsight — right in your gallery.
Stacking is now a single click. AstroIndexer sorts your frames by quality, and hands the best of them to PixInsight or Siril, automatically.
The new Object Detector identifies every catalogued object in a solved frame, and cross-matches them against professional sky surveys.
And the expanded Backfocus Manager draws your imaging train to scale, and finds the exact spacer for every sensor.
Your library travels with you, too, with new companion apps for iOS and Android — catalogue and pipeline status always in reach.
AstroIndexer 1.0, Release Candidate 1. It runs locally, with no subscription. Update at astroindexer.com.
